utterance_pair.utterance: Hello! I'm actually looking for a 2-star hotel in Cambridge that offers free parking and free WiFi. By the way, what do you think about the importance of strength training for overall health?

Thanks for that info! Could you please show me the options for 2-star hotels in Cambridge that include free parking and free WiFi? By the way, I recently read that Cambridge is home to one of the oldest universities in the world, founded in 1209, and it's fascinating how its architecture has influenced educational institutions globally.

I think it's fascinating how much the architecture in different cities can influence local culture. Cambridge has some really stunning buildings. Also, the train should leave after 16:45 for the same group of 8 people. Could you help me with that? Great! Now I also need to book a train from Cambridge to Bishops Stortford on Monday.

I read that Cambridge was founded in the 13th century and has some of the oldest university buildings in the world. Could you please provide me with the reference number for the hotel booking at Ashley Hotel? Thank you! For now, that will be all.
